While it regularly sold closer to $125 until November of last year, storage pricing has steadily climbed since then, with this particular model eventually reaching the $300 range. Today’s Woot deal marks the lowest price we have tracked since that hike, making it a notable chance to score a compact 2TB portable SSD for far less than the usual rates these drives have been fetching lately. Head below for more details.

This FLEXISPOT office chair delivers not only a modern ergonomic style, but also packs a built-in heated back massager. Another unique perk is the integrated coat hanger, which can help keep your office tidy.

items.title: OLIGHT’s mini magnetic Oclip EDC light w/ USB-C charging back at $28 Prime Day low
items.summary:
OLIGHT Oclip Pro EDC Clip-on Light

Buy for $28 (Reg. $40)

What we love

Now starting back down at the lowest price we have tracked on Amazon, these popular OLIGHT EDC flashlights deliver hands-free illumination just about anywhere with simple USB-C charging. It features three modes –  “floodlight with 500 lm, 120-meter range spotlight, and 40 lm red light” – alongside a lanyard hole and magnetic base “designed for clipping, hanging, and magnetic attachment.”

items.title: UGREEN’s new 65W Nexode Air is among the smallest chargers we’ve seen, now down to just $21.50 (46% off)

Buy for $21.50 (Reg. $40)

What we love

UGREEN’s Nexode Air is a tiny 65W USB-C charger, which is great for anyone prefers a compact and portable form factor over other flashy features like a displays or touch controls. Its foldable prongs make it particularly travel-friendly, while the full 65W output is enough to handle phones, tablets, and a MacBook Air on the go.
